% --- MACRO DEFINITIONS ---
\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  בָּרְכוּ אֶת יְיָ הַמְבֹרָךְ! \\
בָּרוּךְ יְיָ הַמְבֹרָךְ \\
לְעוֹלָם וָעֶד!%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  BAR’CHU et Adonai hamvorach! \\
Baruch Adonai ham'vorach \\
l'olam va-ed!%
}

\newcommand{\blockC}{%
  PRAISE ADONAI to whom praise is due forever! \\
Praised be Adonai to whom praise is due, \\
now and forever!%
}

\newcommand{\blockD}{%
  שְׁמַע וּבִרְכוֹתֶיהָ \\
T \\
SH'MA UVIRCHOTEHA - SH'MA AND ITS BLESSINGS%
}

\newcommand{\blockE}{%
  All holy acts require summoning. \\
For those who choose: The prayer leader at the word \\
Bar'chu (the call to worship) bends \\
the knees and bows from the waist, and at "Adonai stands straight. Baruch Adonai is the \\
communal response, whereupon the community repeats the choreography of the first line.%
}
